steps.intent: Bring X to the foreground (or launch it) so the rest of the recipe has a window to act on.
First tap on the compose FAB only expands a speed-dial menu (go-live / spaces / photo / post), it does not navigate anywhere by itself.

The FAB occupies the same screen position as the expanded menu's own 'ポストする'/Post row (that row's own tweet_label text node is not clickable), so tapping composer_write a second time selects Post and opens the actual compose screen with tweet_text.
Type the post text into the compose screen's body field.
Tap the post button to publish.
